news.paragraph: Recent headlines indicate that tech stocks have experienced gains in late afternoon trading, contributing to a broader tech-fueled bull run. Although premarket activity for the sector has recently been mixed, broader market movements are being influenced by an upcoming US-China meeting. No specific imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions are currently highlighted in the news.
